channel.title: Conraid - Slackware current packages
channel.description: Corrado Franco (Conraid) Slackware current package repository.

item.title: Sat, 25 Apr 2026 14:15:14 UTC
item.description:
Happy Italy's Liberation Day!
Siamo tutti antifascisti.
args-6.4.12-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
librist-0.2.14-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
minizip-ng-4.1.2-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
obs-studio-32.1.2-x86_64-2cf.txz:  Rebuilt.
pipewire-jack-1.6.4-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
postman-bin-12.7.6-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-aws-cli2-2.34.37-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-awscrt-0.32.2-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-botocore-1.42.96-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-cryptography-47.0.0-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-mopidy-3.4.2-x86_64-2cf.txz:  Rebuilt.
  Version 4 requires at least Python 3.13,
  so we are sticking with version 3 for now.
python-pkg_resources-81.0.0-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Added.
  Added a temporary stub of pkg_resources (from Arch Linux) to maintain
  compatibility. This will be removed once all dependencies transition
  to python-importlib-metadata or python-importlib_resources.
python-pyopenssl-26.1.0-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-simplejson-4.1.1-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-zope-interface-8.4-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
telegram-bin-6.7.8-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.

item.title: Sun, 12 Apr 2026 09:05:26 UTC
item.description:
libasecnsp11-1-x86_64-9cf.txz:  Removed.
  Removed 10-year-old unmaintained code. System superseded by SPID in Italy.
  I no longer have the hardware to test it.
pystring-1.1.5-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Added.
  Reverted name back to pystring. My automated script got a bit too
  enthusiastic and tagged this as a Python package. It's not. Pardon!
python-pystring-1.1.4-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
python-rich-15.0.0-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
snowball-d5f59a3-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.

item.title: Sat, 11 Apr 2026 20:25:17 UTC
item.description:
I'd like to remind you that I use the testing branch of current
to build my packages.
briar-desktop-bin-0.6.5_beta-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
cairocffi-1.7.1-x86_64-2cf.txz:  Removed.
  It was renamed to python-xxx some time ago. Pardon.

  Renamed to python-pystring.
